backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for Ana, managing user profiles, emotional check-ins, journal entries, and supportive response generation with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the tabbed mood-based resource panel (Music, Dance, Stories, etc.) was removed from ConversationInput.tsx while keeping the emotional check-in input form intact.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, hook, page, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Ana - Your Friend in Every Emotional Need', includes a meta description, and mounts the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages authentication state, guest mode, and full-screen page navigation (Journal, Music, Meditation) using React state, rendering the appropriate page or the main ChatPage within a Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/ChatBottomTabs.t: Bottom tab bar component with Music, Journal, Meditation, Good Vibes, and Watch This tabs; navigation tabs (Music, Journal, Meditation) trigger callback props while content tabs (Good Vibes, Watch This) render inline panel content.
frontend/src/components/ConversationHist: Displays a list of past emotional check-ins and Ana's supportive responses in a chat-style layout, with detailed console logging, speech synthesis cleanup on unmount, and error handling for missing response fields.
frontend/src/components/ConversationInpu: A form component for submitting emotional check-ins with a feeling selector, text area, and optional voice-to-text input via speech recognition. Handles submission via a mutation hook and displays errors for both API and speech recognition failures.
Renders a list of mood-specific dance/movement resource links fetched from a utility function, displayed as styled external link items.
frontend/src/components/GoodVibesTabCont: Displays a hardcoded list of daily affirmations and feel-good external resource links in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/GuestPromptBanne: A dismissible banner prompting guest users to create an account, with dismiss state persisted in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/JournalingMethod: A selectable card button component for choosing a journaling method, with visual highlight styles for the selected state.
frontend/src/components/JournalingTabCon: Renders mood-specific journaling prompts as external links, retrieved from a utility function based on the current mood.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a sticky header (logo, share button, guest badge, login button), a content area, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, supporting both authenticated users and guest-to-login transitions.
frontend/src/components/MeditationTabCon: Renders a list of mood-specific guided meditation and mindfulness resource links as styled external link items.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: A fixed floating control UI for toggling background music playback and mute state, using tooltip-wrapped icon buttons.
Renders mood-specific music recommendation links as styled external link items, sourced from a utility function.
frontend/src/components/PastJournalEntri: Renders a collapsible list of past journal entries with method type badges, mood tags, and formatted timestamps. Entries expand/collapse on click to show full content.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via the useUserProfile hook. Blocks dismissal until the profile is saved.
Displays a supportive AI response including main message, relatable story, action options, and follow-up question, and auto-speaks the main message via speech synthesis.
frontend/src/components/SelfCareTabConte: Renders a list of mood-tailored self-care resource links fetched from a utility function, displayed as styled anchor tags with external link icons.
frontend/src/components/StoriesTabConten: Renders a list of mood-relevant story links fetched from a utility function, displayed as styled anchor tags with external link icons.
frontend/src/components/VoiceRecordingIn: Shows an animated microphone indicator with pulsing bars when voice recording is active; renders nothing when not recording.
frontend/src/components/WhatToWatchTabCo: Renders a list of mood-based video/music links fetched from a utility function, displayed as styled anchor tags with external link icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated and anonymous identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Manages a looping background audio element with autoplay, and exposes toggle play/mute controls along with error state.
frontend/src/hooks/useCheckIns.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all check-ins with generated fallback responses and adding new check-ins, supporting both authenticated backend and guest modes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestCheckIns.ts: Custom hook that manages guest (unauthenticated) check-ins using localStorage, providing functions to add and clear check-in entries with their AI responses.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestJournalEntrie: Custom hook that manages guest journal entries in localStorage, supporting adding new entries with method type, content, and optional mood tag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions and login status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useJournalEntries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving journal entries via the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on save.
Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API to provide speech-to-text functionality with interim results, error handling, and browser support detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech Synthesis API to convert text to speech, with voice selection, speaking state tracking, and verbose debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving the authenticated caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS configuration, OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, and layout styles for the split-panel room background UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat page that displays conversation history and input, with background music control, guest banner, and bottom navigation tabs linking to journal, music, and meditation pages.
frontend/src/pages/JournalPage.tsx: Journal page offering five structured journaling methods (gratitude, reflective, stream, mood, intentions) with draft persistence, save functionality, and display of past entries for both guests and authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/MeditationPage.tsx: Meditation page that lets users select a mood and browse tailored meditation techniques, displaying a detail player when a technique is selected.
frontend/src/pages/MusicPage.tsx: Music page that allows users to pick a mood category and browse matching music tracks, opening an embedded player when a track is selected.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Welcome/onboarding screen presenting two options: continue as a guest with local storage or log in via Internet Identity for persistent cross-device storage.
frontend/src/utils/meditationData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and data for meditation mood categories (calm, anxious, sad, etc.) and their associated guided meditation techniques, each with a name, description, duration, category, and YouTube embed URL.
frontend/src/utils/moodResourceLinks.ts: Exports mood-keyed collections of music tracks (with YouTube embed URLs) and other resource links organized by emotional state such as happy, sad, calm, and energetic.
frontend/src/utils/shareHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions for sharing content via the Web Share API with a clipboard fallback, plus a helper to generate share text for the app.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, CSS variable-based color tokens using oklch, custom warm box shadows, Inter font family, and the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for the Ana Wellness app, recording that the current task is removing the tabbed mood-based resource panel (music, meditation, journaling, etc.) from ConversationInput.tsx while keeping the emotional check-in form.
